scopeNote: Targeted milestone validators passed locally, but lint only passed after running `MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn spotless:apply` because repo-wide Spotless drift remained on the branch. Six scrutiny review artifacts were produced; two features failed review with blocking correctness gaps (RLS session binding fail-open and incomplete validation-superadmin scope verification).

lint.command: cd erp-domain && MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn spotless:apply && MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn spotless:check

blockingIssues.description: `public.erp_accounting_tenant_visible(...)` in `erp-domain/src/main/resources/db/migration_v2/V184__accounting_truth_rls_hard_cut.sql` returns TRUE when `app.current_company_id` is unset, but the live datasource path still only populates `CompanyContextHolder` and does not bind that value onto PostgreSQL sessions; ordinary app DB sessions therefore fail open instead of fail closed.

`scripts/reset_final_validation_runtime.sh` exempts `validation.superadmin@example.com` from auth-scope validation, so the reset harness can print successful seed verification even when the validation super-admin actor exists with the wrong platform auth scope.

appliedUpdates.description: Added six scrutiny review artifacts for the completed accounting-boundary-and-tenant-safety implementation features, covering characterization, facade seams, RLS, cross-module fail-closed checks, runtime seed verification, and compose seed restoration.
Recorded the validator outcomes and synthesized blocking review findings for the milestone so the orchestrator can queue fix packets before user testing.
Ran `mvn spotless:apply` to clear repo-local Spotless drift so the milestone lint validator could be rechecked successfully on this branch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require RLS packets to prove how live datasource sessions receive tenant context (for example, connection/session binding), and reject synthetic `set_config(...)`-only proofs as insufficient for fail-closed completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The failed scrutiny review for `accounting-tenant-isolation-rls-hardcut` found that the migration depended on `app.current_company_id`, but the runtime only sets `CompanyContextHolder`; the proof test manually called `set_config(...)`, masking the missing production binding.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that a feature's explicit verification contract can supersede the default `commands.gate-fast` recommendation, and instruct workers to record that scoped exception without treating it as a deviation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing review for `accounting-facade-layer-seams-hardcut` notes the feature contract intentionally used `test-characterization`, `compile`, and `targeted-accounting-proof`, yet the skill still framed `gate-fast` as the default final step.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tell workers to stop and return to orchestrator when a session is derailed by host-level Factory/BYOK configuration outside the repository, instead of spending packet time editing `~/.factory` or other host settings.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The first attempt at `accounting-characterization-bedrock` spent its session fixing a BYOK/provider mapping in `~/.factory/settings.json`, and the feature description later had to add an explicit note that the host-level mismatch was outside packet scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the required handoff schema with what scrutiny expects by explicitly requiring structured safety-pattern, access-control proof, contract-artifact, and skill-feedback fields in final handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing review for `cross-module-accounting-tenant-fail-closed` found that the emitted handoff omitted the richer structured fields referenced by the worker skill, making scrutiny depend on transcript reconstruction instead of the handoff itself.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a dedicated validation-seed probe command to `.factory/services.yaml`.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not applied in this failing scrutiny packet because a safe additive command would either duplicate the long SQL fixture-check logic from `scripts/reset_final_validation_runtime.sh` or require new helper-script refactoring beyond low-risk validation triage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update `.factory/library/environment.md` to document the new `prod,flyway-v2,mock,validation-seed` compose defaults.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not applied because this worker run is constrained from editing repo documentation unless explicitly requested; surfaced instead for orchestrator triage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the 30-day entry-date guard ordering ahead of locked-period rejection in shared-state docs.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not applied because this worker run is constrained from editing repo documentation unless explicitly requested; the factual gap is preserved here for orchestrator follow-up.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add shared-state guidance describing seed-fixture dependencies for live runtime proofs and the `CompanyContextHolder`-to-PostgreSQL session binding contract.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not applied because those are documentation/knowledge updates outside the requested validator packet and require orchestrator judgment on the right permanent home.
